name: Gromm Ur God
description:
This is my Skyrim OC

"Being a dragonborn is hard... I did not choose this fate... But since fate is stronger than me, I will fulfill my destiny.."

Here is an orc who unwittingly turned out to be a dragonborn. His path runs through the whole of Skyrim to High Hrothgar. You may encounter many dangers and adventures along the way.

"I wonder who you are? Is it a friend who is on the same path with me, or an enemy who wants to prevent me from fulfilling my destiny?"
creator: ShoggotBunny
